standards.subject: Reading
standards.description: Generate questions about text before, during, and after reading to deepen understanding.

standards.subject: Reading
standards.description: Make and correct or confirm predictions using text features and evidence.

standards.subject: Reading
standards.description: Retell, paraphrase, or summarize texts in ways that maintain meaning and order.

standards.subject: Reading
standards.description: Make inferences and use evidence to support understanding of text.
